spec_match.rationale: 100% spec match. Exercises the spec contract where background-clip: border-area clips specifically to the painted regions of the border style strokes, which natively behaves transparently in-between dashes/dots on Chrome 150.

interactive.rationale: High interactive capability. Uses dynamic border-width range sliders and gradient preset buttons to repaint all 8 styled boxes simultaneously.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles multiple distinct boundary radii (rounded, pill, circle) demonstrating dashes and dots following circular curvature natively.

references.rationale: Correct CSS WG specifications draft and ChromeStatus links.

design_system.rationale: Excellent layout. Fits perfectly inside the display showcase.

summary: An outstanding, highly compliant interactive demonstration verifying that border-area clips correctly to only the painted pixels of dotted/dashed borders across various boundary curves.
